name: Opportunity — Build
purpose: Assemble a fully scored and explained OpportunityCard from a normalized discovery task. Runs profile assessment, signal aggregation, pattern matching, scoring, entry mode selection, and explanation generation.

trigger.description: Triggered by wf.discovery.manual-intake.v1 after a normalized-discovery-task.v1 is produced.

steps.name: match_market_signals
steps.description: Fetch and validate market-signal.normalized.v1 records relevant to the normalized problem.

steps.name: match_business_patterns
steps.description: Match business-pattern.v1 records to the opportunity context.

steps.name: assemble_build_input
steps.description: Assemble opportunity-build-input.v1 from founder profile, signals, and patterns.

steps.name: calculate_scores
steps.description: Compute market, founder fit, pattern, entry feasibility scores and penalties. Produce scoring-run.v1.

steps.name: generate_opportunity_card
steps.description: Produce opportunity-card.v1 with explanation layer (summary, why_now, risks, first_offer, first_test).

steps.name: validate_output_shape
steps.description: Validate opportunity-card.v1 against contract. Reject if required fields missing.

notes: Template only. No live n8n nodes. Import pending after MVP core is complete. This is the primary opportunity production workflow.
